Municipal EV Charging Infrastructure — City of Vigo

Data source: Concello de Vigo Open Data Portal — datos.vigo.org (GeoJSON)
Interactive map of public EV charging points within the city of Vigo, sourced from the local open data portal. This dataset serves as a granular validation layer for national DGT data, and illustrates the typical density and distribution of urban charging infrastructure. Click any marker for station name, address, and available connector information. Vigo is used as a representative mid-sized Spanish city case study; similar local datasets are available for other municipalities via datos.gob.es.
EV Charging Points — All Spain DGT [Folium]
11,567 charging sites across Spain · HeatMap = all | Markers = 600 sample
